https://reddit.com/r/ecommerce/1.title: Import tariffs from China to US are killing my margins
replies: Have you looked into the de minimis exemption? Under $800 can enter duty-free.
Check if your products qualify for any exclusions or tariff classifications.

https://zhihu.com/question/1.title: HS编码查不准确怎么办？
replies: 建议用海关官方的归类查询系统，虽然操作麻烦但最准确。
找报关行帮忙归类，他们比较有经验。
